name: Spanish Rice with Avocado
recipeIngredient: 1 can 14.5 oz Chicken broth, or 3 3/4 chicken stock
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter and olive oil in a 2-quart pan over medium heat.
2. When the butter is melted, add onion and garlic; cook until the onion is tender.
3. Add rice; stir constantly for 3 minutes or until the rice appears milky and opaque.
4. Add salt, dried oregano, ground cumin, turmeric, and chicken broth. Bring to a boil.
5. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is tender and all liquid is absorbed.
6. Peel and pit the avocado; dice it.
7. Fluff up the rice with a fork and add diced avocado. Gently toss everything together.
8. Turn off the heat. Let stand for 5 minutes before serving.
NOTES: I have also made this with peeled, seeded, diced tomatoes instead of avocado.
